items.name: Bundle of TNT
items.description: Industrially, TNT is synthesized in a three-step process. First, toluene is nitrated with a mixture of sulfuric and nitric acid to produce mono-nitrotoluene or MNT. The MNT is separated and then renitrated to dinitrotoluene or DNT. In the final step, the DNT is nitrated to trinitrotoluene or TNT using an anhydrous mixture of nitric acid and oleum. Nitric acid is consumed by the manufacturing process, but the diluted sulfuric acid can be reconcentrated and reused. Subsequent to nitration, TNT is stabilized by a process called sulphitation, where the crude TNT is treated with aqueous sodium sulfite solution in order to remove less stable isomers of TNT and other undesired reaction products. The rinse water from sulphitation is known as red water and is a significant pollutant and waste product of TNT manufacture.
items.searchText: bundle of tnt industrially, tnt is synthesized in a three-step process. first, toluene is nitrated with a mixture of sulfuric and nitric acid to produce mono-nitrotoluene or mnt. the mnt is separated and then renitrated to dinitrotoluene or dnt. in the final step, the dnt is nitrated to trinitrotoluene or tnt using an anhydrous mixture of nitric acid and oleum. nitric acid is consumed by the manufacturing process, but the diluted sulfuric acid can be reconcentrated and reused. subsequent to nitration, tnt is stabilized by a process called sulphitation, where the crude tnt is treated with aqueous sodium sulfite solution in order to remove less stable isomers of tnt and other undesired reaction products. the rinse water from sulphitation is known as red water and is a significant pollutant and waste product of tnt manufacture. roblox bundles all custombundle emo furry gyaru metal

items.name: Shadow Sword
items.description: Equipping the Shadow Sword shrouds your character in darkness. You immediately transform into a warrior wearing a jet-black suit and begin emitting a cloud of dark fog. While your appearance unnerves and disorients your opponents, each sword strike does 35 points of damage and pressing space twice teleports you forward.
